plugins.name: talksmith
plugins.description: Presenter Agent for talks and pitches. Takes raw sources (PDFs, papers, chat exports, URLs, images) through an 8-step workflow — Frame → Collect → Corpus → Draft → Review → Polish → Learnings → Render PPTX — to a structured outline (draft.md), a polished deliverable (final.md), and optionally a .pptx. Five subagents (Librarian, Composer, Editor, Illustrator, Global-Librarian) plus skills for ingestion, ASCII→SVG, polish, and PPTX rendering.
